title: spathiphyllum minahassae
intro: Spathiphyllum minahassae, also known as the Minahassa spath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is native to Indonesia, particularly in the Minahassa region of Sulawesi Island, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including wounds and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Spathiphyllum minahassae include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat fever, cough, and other health conditions.
